_note: v0.3 Item 8 extended + §1.3 denarrow fix: bind:value dispatches the target type from (tag, literal type attribute). <input type='number'> → number; <input type='range'> → number; <input> / <input type='text'> / <textarea> → string. After §1.3, simple-identifier targets (`let strForNumber: string = ''`) ALSO fire — the denarrow rewrite no longer widens non-null/undefined-init lets to `any`. Only `let X: T = null` and `let X: T = undefined` literal patterns still get denarrowed (those need the widen to prevent TS's flow-narrowing to the literal null/undefined).
